# Pull request

## What changed

Describe the user-visible problem and the change that fixes it.

## Why this approach

Explain why this is the smallest correct solution and note alternatives considered.

## Validation

List the exact commands and manual checks you ran.

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Relevant shell, Ruby, npm, or workflow checks pass
- [ ] Changed public links were tested anonymously
- [ ] Tests or regression coverage were added where behavior changed

## Release impact

- [ ] No release metadata changes
- [ ] Version, URL, or checksum changes match an existing immutable release asset
- [ ] Documentation and upgrade notes are updated

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, customer data, private paths, or runtime state are included
- [ ] Untrusted code receives no release, signing, registry, or production secrets
